content:
Coach Perry Running

Welcome. I'm Shannon Perry, a sports physical therapist in Birmingham and the volunteer head track coach at Crestwood High. This is where I share sprint coaching, meet recaps, training logs, and what I'm learning about getting athletes healthy and fast.
title: Home

content:
About Coach Perry

I'm Shannon Perry, DPT and board-certified sports specialist. By day I treat athletes at Iron City Sports Medicine; afternoons and Saturdays I coach sprints and relays at Crestwood High. I grew up in Birmingham, run before dawn, and sing in the men's choir at New Hope AME. This site is my coaching notebook made public.
title: About Coach Perry

content:
Coaching

I coach sprinters and relay athletes on technique, speed development, and staying healthy across a season. Whether you're a high schooler chasing a college spot or a parent who wants help finding the right program, here's how I work and what I focus on.
title: Coaching

content:
Track Camps and Clinics

Each off-season I run small-group track camps and one-day clinics around Birmingham — block starts, acceleration, and relay handoffs. Dates and registration for upcoming clinics are posted here as they're set.
title: Track Camps and Clinics

content:
Contact

Want to talk about coaching, a clinic, or just swap running routes? Email me at shannon.perry@finthesiss.ai or call (205) 555-0190. I read everything, though it may take a day or two during meet season.
title: Contact

content:
Running Log

My own training, logged honestly — easy miles, tempo work, long runs, and the occasional rough morning. Currently building toward the Mercedes-Benz Marathon weekend half in Birmingham.
title: Running Log

content:
Blog

Sprint mechanics, meet recaps, return-to-sport notes, BBQ and meal prep, faith, and the recruiting journey of our athletes. New posts most weeks during the season.
title: Blog

content:
Sprint Coaching

One-on-one and small-group sprint coaching focused on the start, acceleration, and max-velocity mechanics. I film every session so athletes can see what we're fixing.
title: Sprint Coaching

content:
Return to Sport

For athletes coming back from injury, I build criteria-based return-to-sport plans that bridge the gap between physical therapy clearance and full training. This is the work I do every day at Iron City Sports Medicine.
title: Return to Sport

content:
Training Plans

Structured plans I share with athletes and readers: off-season speed development, a beginner half marathon plan, and return-to-sport progressions. Free to use, built from what's worked.
title: Training Plans

content:
Athlete Spotlights

Profiles of the Crestwood athletes I'm proud to coach — their events, their bests, and what they're working toward. Devon, Trey, Kayla, and more.
title: Athlete Spotlights

content:
Recruiting Help

What I tell families about the college recruiting process — film, timing, contact rules, and unofficial visits. Following our own athletes through it in real time.
title: Recruiting Help

content:
Birmingham Running Routes

A growing map of my favorite routes around Birmingham — the Crestwood South loop, Lakeshore, Vulcan Trail, and the Red Mountain hills — with distances and where to park.
title: Birmingham Running Routes

content:
BBQ and Meal Prep

How I cook for a week of early mornings — the smoker, the sides, and the simple plates that keep me fueled. Recipes and meal-prep notes for runners.
title: BBQ and Meal Prep

content:
Faith and Running

A little about New Hope AME, the men's choir, and why a quiet Sunday long run is part of how I keep my week honest.
title: Faith and Running

content:
Sprint Film Library

Side-by-side film breakdowns I use with athletes — starts, drive phase, and top-end mechanics. A teaching archive, not a highlight reel.
title: Sprint Film Library

content:
Iron City Charity 5K

Information about the Iron City Sports Medicine charity 5K, a community race I help organize each fall to support youth sports access in Birmingham.
title: Iron City Charity 5K

content:
Frequently Asked Questions

How coaching sessions work, what to bring to a clinic, whether I work with adult runners, and how to reach me during meet season. The short answers are here.
title: Frequently Asked Questions

content:
Newsletter

A short monthly note with the latest posts, upcoming clinics, and meet results. Sign up to follow along with the Crestwood track season and my own training.
title: Newsletter

content:
Privacy Policy

How this site handles your information. Short version: if you email me or sign up for the newsletter, I use your details only to reply or send the newsletter, and never sell or share them.
title: Privacy Policy
